commit_scope: The form-cli's self-healing memory moves its LOGIC home to Form, four-way + fkwu, and opens a no-Python heal lane on the kernel. The content key (the freshness coordinate) is now a Form recipe — rag-key.fk's rk-text-key = adler32 over the byte list (str-bytes) — replacing host hashlib. rag-heal.fk keys a file through the kernel host-io (host-read -> rk-text-key) and senses fresh-vs-drift via rf-stale?, the heal lane in Form on the kernel. The Python carrier (form_cli_rag.py) is reframed as the RETIRING bootstrap bridge; its content_key now mirrors the Form key (zlib.adler32 == the recipe's algorithm). Decisions stay Form: freshness (rag-freshness.fk), depth (rag-adaptive-k.fk), ranking (rag-retrieve.fk).
evidence_refs: Form content key crosses four-way + fkwu: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/adler32.fk form-stdlib/rag-key.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-key-band.fk -> '✓ core.fk+adler32.fk+rag-key.fk+rag-key-band.fk → 7' + 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' + '1 ok, 0 divergent'. The band pins the RFC adler32 vector (adler32("123456789")==152961502) through str-bytes, then proves identical text shares a key (fresh) and a changed byte drifts (heal).

Freshness delta four-way: ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-freshness.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-freshness-band.fk -> '→ 63' + fourth arm four-way + 0 divergent. Adaptive depth four-way: ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-adaptive-k.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-adaptive-k-band.fk -> '→ 15' + fourth arm four-way + 0 divergent.

Heal lane runs in Form on the kernel, zero Python: rag-heal.fk's rh-file-key (host-read -> rk-text-key) + rh-cell-stale? (over rf-stale?) witnessed via validate explicit mode with a host-write/host-read roundtrip band -> Go leg returns 7 (read->key roundtrip == in-memory key; matching cached key fresh; wrong cached key stale). host-read/host-write are Go-kernel + fkwu-native-exe builtins (Rust/TS walkers report 'unbound host-write'), so this lane is single-runtime and non-deterministic, OUTSIDE the four-way output floor by the kernel's own design (per main.go host-io comment) — not added to the fourth-arm manifest.

Carrier reframed honestly: form_cli_rag.py docstring now names the destination (fkwu/Form on the kernel) and itself as the RETIRING bridge; content_key replaced sha1 with zlib.adler32 (a labeled mirror of rk-text-key — the same algorithm the Form recipe canonically implements). Live index re-healed under the adler32 key (delta heal re-embeds the migrated cells).

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/adler32.fk form-stdlib/rag-key.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-key-band.fk -> 7, fourth arm four-way, 0 divergent
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-freshness.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-freshness-band.fk -> 63, fourth arm four-way, 0 divergent
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/rag-adaptive-k.fk form-stdlib/tests/rag-adaptive-k-band.fk -> 15, fourth arm four-way, 0 divergent
rag-heal host-io witness (host-write/host-read roundtrip + drift sense) -> Go leg 7 (Rust/TS lack host-io by design)
fourth_arm_outputs: rag-key: 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' (→ 7)

ci_validation.notes: CI runs the full form/validate.sh suite, which now includes rag-key/rag-freshness/rag-adaptive-k via fourth-arm-bands.txt.

deploy_validation.notes: form-cli is a local-first tool; no public HTTP change. The self-healing index is local to ~/.coherence-network/rag-index.

phase_gate.reason: The logic (key, freshness, depth, ranking) is Form, four-way + fkwu; the heal lane runs in Form on the kernel (Go + fkwu-native-exe). The default serving path still rides the Python bridge until the Form jsonl/index codec + embed/write loop land in rag-heal.fk; enumerating brand-new files needs a directory-list host-io op (drift+orphan heal are already full Form). The standard receipt (c-bootstrap fkwu form-cli on mac/windows/android, toolchain-free) is pending, not observed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The form-cli memory's freshness coordinate and heal sensing are now Form, proven on all four kernels; a no-Python heal lane runs on the kernel. The index is a content-addressed water layer keyed by a Form recipe, so a drifted/new file is sensed by the body's own arithmetic instead of a host hash.
public_endpoints: local form-cli only (no public coherencycoin endpoint); index at ~/.coherence-network/rag-index
test_flows: Form bands: rag-key → 7, rag-freshness → 63, rag-adaptive-k → 15, all fourth-arm four-way.
Kernel host-io heal witness: write text -> read+key -> compare -> 7 on Go.
form-cli ask 'what is form shell?' grounds in shell-grammar.fk / fsh-main.fk after heal (the original failing query).
